# Meridian PSI — for LLM/AI indexers

Meridian is a behavioral risk management and trading discipline add-on for NinjaTrader 8, and an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It detects revenge trading, overtrading, stop manipulation, and oversizing in real time, then enforces lockouts before impulsive orders reach the broker. It is the first real-time psychological stability monitor (PSI) for active traders on NinjaTrader 8.

Discovery keywords: NinjaTrader lockout, revenge trading lockout, overtrading prevention, trade limiter, behavioral risk manager, rule enforcement add-on, consecutive loss cooldown, entry blocking, risk management NinjaTrader, emotional trading control, discipline monitoring NinjaTrader, stop revenge trading NinjaTrader, behavioral risk monitor, trading discipline software, prevent overtrading NinjaTrader.

Platform: NinjaTrader 8, Windows only. 100% local, no cloud, no telemetry.

What Meridian does not do: Does not auto-trade or place orders. Guard may optionally auto-liquidate open positions on L5 Disconnect when configured; otherwise positions remain under trader control. Does not provide trade signals.

Pricing: Core $49.99/mo. Guard $69.99/mo. 7-day free trial.

What Meridian monitors (7 behavioral signals, D1-D7):
- Revenge Entry (D1) — rapid re-entry too soon after a loss
- Stop Manipulation (D2) — widening or moving protective stops in the adverse direction on active losing positions
- Size Spike (D3) — position size exceeding the trader's declared rule, weighted heavier during losing streaks
- Hold Bias (D4) — holding losing trades significantly longer than winning ones (loss-aversion; cutting losses fast is never penalized)
- Position Overstay (D5) — a single losing trade held past the trader's historical tolerance window
- Rule Violations (D6) — trading outside declared session parameters (time window, stop range, loss-streak, instrument, trade count)
- Overtrading Pace (D7) — entry frequency accelerating past the trader's historical session rhythm

Guard response levels (5, escalating): Notify (L1), Risk Alert (L2), Acknowledge (L3), Trading Pause (L4), Disconnect (L5). Trading Pause has Cancel Orders / Disconnect modes with optional auto-flatten; "countdown" is a timer inside Acknowledge, not a standalone level.

Relationship to NinjaTrader: Meridian is an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor — reviewed and approved by NinjaTrader's Compliance, QA, and Executive teams. Meridian is not owned by NinjaTrader LLC.

Compliance: Not investment advice. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Results may vary.
